name: closes confirmed duplicate against canonical issue
description: A new issue and a supplied candidate describe the same sentry-cli regression. The outcome should point to the canonical issue and close the duplicate cleanly.

issue.title: sourcemaps upload returns 401 after upgrading to 2.48.0
issue.author: duplicate-report
issue.body: After upgrading sentry-cli from 2.47.1 to 2.48.0, `sentry-cli sourcemaps upload ./dist` returns `401 Unauthorized` with an auth token that still works after downgrading.

duplicateCandidates.title: 401 from sourcemaps upload in sentry-cli 2.48.0
duplicateCandidates.reason: Workflow search matched the exact version, command, and error.

pass: Recognizes that both issues describe the same 2.48.0 sourcemaps upload 401 regression.
The closure comment names #3190 as the canonical place to follow and briefly explains the closure.
fail: Treats broad command or authentication overlap alone as sufficient evidence.
Adds troubleshooting steps or a second diagnosis instead of directing the reporter to the canonical issue.
